# Security Policy

## Supported version

Security updates are applied to the current production version at
https://mandarintrainer.com/.

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please report suspected vulnerabilities through GitHub's private vulnerability
reporting form:

https://github.com/bobabar/chinese-trainer/security/advisories/new

Do not disclose a vulnerability in a public issue. Include the affected page or
component, reproduction steps, impact, and any suggested mitigation. The
maintainers will triage the report privately and coordinate remediation and
disclosure as appropriate.
